title: Shepherds the Community
summary: You keep the place where you live safe from all danger.
tiers: Tier 3: Shepherd’s Fury or Skill With Defense
Tier 6: Greater Skill With Attacks or Protective Wall
gm_intrusions: People in the community misunderstand the character’s motives. Rivals try to oust the character.
text: You keep the place where you live safe from all danger.
